name: EmptyState
description: A complete empty state component with decorative background patterns and customizable illustration placement. Provides a polished way to display empty states with visual hierarchy.
usage_guidelines: Use for empty state displays (no data, no results, etc.).
Place illustration in the illustration prop - typically use IconFrame with an icon.
Use children for content below the background (title, description).
Use negative offset prop to pull content closer to the illustration.
Choose variant based on design aesthetic (wave, grid, dots).

size.description: Width and height of background in pixels.

illustration.description: Illustration or icon to display centered on the background. Typically use IconFrame with an icon.

offset.description: Vertical offset (margin-top) for the content below the illustration. Use negative values to pull content up.

children.description: Content to display below the background (title, description).

styling_info.visual_description: A vertically stacked layout with a decorative SVG background pattern containing the illustration, followed by content below. The offset prop allows fine-tuning the vertical spacing.

Do: Use IconFrame with icons for consistent illustration style
Use negative offset to create visual overlap
Choose appropriate variant for your design
Dont: Don't forget to handle empty state logic
